title: Corellia News Service
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Corellia News Service''' broadcasted news feeds throughout the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]].

==History==
In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="SWG_timeline">{{SWG_timeline}}</ref> [[Corellian Security Force]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Alana Walden]] used Corellia News Service to allege [[Bandor Mokk]] and [[Faye Patrick]] as dangerous suspects [[Corellian slavers|responsible]] for the increasing amount of missing persons on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. This particular feed was broadcasted from [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]]. Around the same tome, the service reported a travel warning for the city of [[Nashal]], on [[Talus/Legends|Talus]], from the local [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police force]] and the [[Cluster World Relations]] agency following the eruption of hostile [[Anti-Humanism|anti-human]] demonstrations from the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonian]] population. Corellia News Service interviewed [[Marx Grocco]], Director of Cluster World Relations, who explained that this measure was meant to insure the public safety of Talusian human citizens and human travelers for any possible hostile encounters with non-human protestors. The service also attempted to interview the Selonian [[den mother]] [[Kiisa Kimotte]] but without success.<ref name="web">{{SonyCite|url=en_US/players/content.vm?id=66901&resource=features|text=Chapter 1: The Corellian Captives}}</ref>
